manPowerSupply.title: Man Power Supply
manPowerSupply.description: Managing many people could be burdensome to your company. We provide man power supply (Professional Employer Organization) that helps fulfill workforce requirement with less workload. We will be in charge of managing the workforce while you align their goals according to your business productivity.

humanResource.title: Human Resource
humanResource.description: Comprehensive HR solutions to optimize your human capital and drive organizational excellence through strategic talent management and development.

headhunting.title: Talent Headhunting
headhunting.description: Talented employees will ease you in achieving company goals. We help you find talents that you need with our extended experience in talent seeking. Just simply tell us the specification and requirement, then we will give you a shortlist of potential talent that you can hire.

hrDevelopment.title: HR Development
hrDevelopment.description: Investing in good employees will benefit your company in mid-long term. We assist you in making the strategy to develop your Human Resources and implementing the strategy through training and courses that they need.

hrAdministration.title: HR Administration
hrAdministration.description: Doing administrative works and applying permits need loads of energy and time. We will reduce the burden you had by taking over the job and you can use the energy to push the company forward.

bpo.title: BPO - Business Process Outsourcing
bpo.description: Streamline operations with business process outsourcing (BPO): we run people-related business and administrative processes—from payroll to compliance—so your teams can focus on growth.

payroll.title: Payroll Services
payroll.description: Eliminate error risk by using our payroll services. We will not only help you calculate the salary, we also help you manage the insurance and local regulation (BPJS). In addition, we will provide assistance to apply reimbursement to insurance & BPJS if needed.

timeAttendance.title: Time & Attendance
timeAttendance.description: Improve your company productivity by using our services. We will apply time & attendance system that suits your company needs and condition. The benefit of our services is the integration of time & attendance system with our online platform, allowing us to monitor our employee status in real time.

faq.title: Common Questions About Our Services
faq.subtitle: Short answers to the questions we most often hear from prospective clients.

items.q: What services does PT. Sigma Solusi Servis offer?
items.a: We provide man power supply, HR services (talent headhunting, HR development, administration), and BPO for payroll, BPJS, and time & attendance. As an Indonesian manpower provider and outsourcing company operating since 2015, we serve businesses across Indonesia with execution coverage in Jabodetabek, Surabaya, Bandung, and Medan.

items.q: How much does outsourcing cost in Indonesia?
items.a: Total cost per head typically lands at 1.35–1.55× the base wage (per UMP/UMK at the location), including BPJS, THR, severance reserve, and an 8–18% management fee. Final rates depend on role type, location, SLA complexity, and headcount scale. See our article on outsourcing service pricing for a full cost-component breakdown.

items.q: Does Sigma comply with Permenaker No. 7 of 2026?
items.a: Yes. The outsourcing scopes we serve—cleaning, security, catering, employee transportation, general operational support, and mining-sector support—fall within the six categories permitted under Permenaker 7/2026. Worker rights (wages, THR, overtime, K3, BPJS, termination) are met per current regulation.

items.q: How long does the onboarding process take?
items.a: For standard support roles with clear specifications, typically 7–14 working days from contract signing to workers ready at site. For mass recruitment or specialist roles, the timeline can be longer and will be agreed upfront as part of the SLA.

items.q: Which industries and cities does Sigma serve?
items.a: We have cross-industry experience—retail, FMCG, ISP & telecommunications, technology, and F&B—with an understanding of workforce profiles and compliance requirements that differ by sector. Sigma serves businesses across Indonesia, with the strongest execution coverage in Jabodetabek, Surabaya, Bandung, and Medan. Our clients include Biznet, Klikit, Bang Churros, BukuWarung, and Axiata Digital Labs, among others.

items.q: How do I start working with Sigma?
items.a: Contact us for a free 30-minute consultation—we will map your needs and send a proposal with transparent cost components. No commitment at this stage; you can compare with other vendors before deciding.
